title: Test https://github.com/containers/automation_images/pull/355
body:
... which has stopped installing mlocate, so confirm that doesn't break anything.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```

Debian is [failing in cirrus](https://cirrus-ci.com/task/5290547571589120), consistently over many reruns. Failure looks real.

Same thing is happening in [my pr](https://cirrus-ci.com/task/5068398307049472). Debian is broken. Pause.

Log says
```
[[0;1;31m!!!!!![0m] Refusing to run under cgroup v1, SY… specified on kernel command line.


[    6.700069] systemd[1]: Freezing execution.
```
My hunch: new systemd on Debian. SOLUTION: resurrect my https://github.com/containers/automation_images/pull/338
https://github.com/containers/automation_images/pull/338 was merged, this test has served its purpose
